zh.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Murray是Patrick Murray的兒子，於大約1383年出生在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾考普爾。他於1403年與Jean Scott在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1438年在英國蘇格蘭享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Murray是Patrick Murray的儿子，于大约1383年出生在英国苏格兰度福利爾考普爾。他于1403年与Jean Scott在英国苏格兰度福利爾结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1438年在英国苏格兰享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Murray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Moray in northeastern Scotland, which derives from Celtic mori- ‘sea’ + treb- ‘settlement’. The founder of the Scottish house of Murray was a Fleming named Freskin who was granted Strathbrock in West Lothian and Duffus in Moray by David I. The family took its name from the region in the late 12th century.
Irish and Scottish: shortened form of   McMurray  .
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muireadhaigh ‘descendant of Muireadhach’ a personal name meaning ‘mariner’. Occasionally it may be a shortened form of McMurray .

variants.name: Murry
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Murray  .

variants.name: Murrah
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish   Murray  .

variants.name: Murie
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Murie in Errol (Perthshire).
Scottish and Irish: variant of   Murray  .

variants.name: Merhi
meanings: Arabic (mainly Lebanon and Syria): from a variant of the personal name Mirhi of unknown meaning. Bearers of this surname are both Muslims and Christians. Compare Murray 5.

variants.name: McMurray
meanings: Irish (northern) and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muireadhaigh or Mac Muireadhaich, a patronymic from the personal name Muireadhach ‘seafarer’ (see Murdoch ). Compare McCurry 1.

variants.name: Murra
meanings: Italian (Sicily): topographic name from Sicilian murra ‘large rock, mass of rocks’ or a habitational name from a place called with this word.
Albanian: nickname from murrë (definite form murra) ‘dark gray cow’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Murray was born about 1383, in Cockpool, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom as the son of Patrick Murray. He married Jean Scott in 1403, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1438, in Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Murray est né environ 1383, à Cockpool, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, fils de Patrick Murray. Il a épousé Jean Scott en 1403, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1438, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Murray wurde um 1383 in Cockpool, Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Patrick Murray geboren. Er hat 1403 in Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Jean Scott geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1438 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Murray è nato il circa 1383 nel Cockpool, Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito come figlio di Patrick Murray. Lui sposato Jean Scott nel 1403, nel Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1438, nel Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Murrayは約1383年にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアコクプオオルでPatrick Murrayの息子として生まれた。1403年にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアでJean Scottと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1438年にイギリススコットランドで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Murray(은)는 대략 1383년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 콕포에서 Patrick Murray의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1403년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르에서 Jean Scott(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1438년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Murray nasceu aproximadamente 1383, em Cockpool, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom filho de Patrick Murray. Ele casou-se com Jean Scott em 1403, em Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1438, em Escócia, United Kingdom, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Murray родился около 1383 г. в местности коккпул, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Patrick Murray. Он женился на женщине по имени Jean Scott в 1403 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1438 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Murray nació aproximadamente 1383, en Cockpool, Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido como hijo de Patrick Murray. Se casó con Jean Scott en 1403, en Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1438, en Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años.
